Class Enemy

java.lang.Object
Character
Enemy
Direct Known Subclasses:
Minotaur, Thief, Unique_Enemy, Viking
public abstract class Enemy extends Character
Class file for the abstract Enemy Class, this is a subclass of the abstract Character class.

This class serves as the Player's opponent in battle.

This class now implements faux AI, each subclass implements a different attack pattern dictated upon initialization

This class also contains a static attribute to keep track of the total Enemy objects generated.

See Also:

    • totalEnemies

      public static int totalEnemies

  • Constructor Details

    • Enemy

      public Enemy(String name, String type, int hitPoints, int attack, int defense, int speed, String pattern)
      Constructor for the enemy class
      Parameters:
      name - name of the enemy, all names are assumed valid
      type - type of the enemy, all types are assumed valid
      hitPoints - base HP of the enemy, all values are assumed valid
      attack - attack value of the enemy, all values are assumed valid
      defense - defense value of the enemy, all values are assumed valid
      speed - speed value of the enemy, all values are assumed valid
      pattern - attack pattern of the enemy
